channel.title: Ps5 on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Ps5 on MinWeb

item.title: Why PlayStation Console Prices No Longer Drop Over Time
item.description: Discover why the era of inevitable console price drops has ended and learn how shifting global economics have permanently changed the cost of owning a...

item.title: Sony Increases PS5 and Pro Prices: What You Need to Know
item.description: Sony has announced significant price hikes across its entire PlayStation 5 lineup; find out what these increases mean for gamers and why costs are rising.
